SCREEN 01 · HOMEDAILY ENTRY POINT
Screen 01

Home — your daily
entry point.

A warm greeting, the selected store, and three quick actions — Find, Offers, Shop. Below, this week's deals as a swipable hero carousel.

  • A

    Store-aware header

    "My Store" switcher anchors every offer and hour in the right location.

  • B

    Three primary actions

    Find · Offers · Shop — large tap targets, one thumb-reach away.

  • C

    Latest offers hero

    This week's promotions, surfaced immediately. Swipe for more.

01 / 07BHAT-BHATENI SUPERMARKET
SCREEN 02 · OFFERS & DEALSWEEKLY ROTATION
Screen 02

Every week,
every store, every deal.

A dedicated feed of all live promotions, filterable by category. Paper flyers become tappable, shareable, trackable.

  • A

    Category filters

    Dairy, Frozen, Groceries, Household — horizontally scrollable chips.

  • B

    Two-column grid

    More offers per scroll, every card with a clear end-date.

  • C

    Urgency, built-in

    "Ends Apr 21" nudges shoppers to come in before the deal closes.

02 / 07BHAT-BHATENI SUPERMARKET
SCREEN 03 · OFFER DETAILSONE TAP TO THE DEAL
Screen 03

One tap
to the deal.

Branded offer header, clear validity date, the full terms — no fine print buried, no redirect to a PDF.

  • A

    Category signal

    Colour + tag communicate the deal type at a glance.

  • B

    Valid-until pill

    The single most-asked question, answered above the fold.

  • C

    Honest terms

    "Valid at all 28 BBSM locations." Plain language, plain type.

03 / 07BHAT-BHATENI SUPERMARKET
SCREEN 04 · STORE NETWORK28 LOCATIONS
Screen 04

28 locations,
one map.

Every BBSM store, searchable by name or city, grouped by province. Directions and a one-tap "My Store" switch.

  • A

    My Store, pinned

    The selected store stays at the top — the anchor for all offers.

  • B

    Province grouping

    Bagmati, Gandaki, Lumbini — scannable, not a flat list of 28.

  • C

    Actions inline

    Directions, select, check hours — without leaving the row.

04 / 07BHAT-BHATENI SUPERMARKET
SCREEN 05 · PRODUCT CATALOGUEBROWSE THE SHELF
Screen 05

Browse the
entire shelf.

The whole catalogue, searchable and filterable. Featured items bubble up; prices and units are unambiguous.

  • A

    Live search

    Typeahead across SKU name, brand and category — Nepali + English.

  • B

    Featured badge

    Merchandising hook for new arrivals, private label, seasonals.

  • C

    Price + unit, always

    "Rs 95 /litre" leaves no room for confusion at the shelf.

05 / 07BHAT-BHATENI SUPERMARKET
SCREEN 06 · PRODUCT DETAILSTRANSPARENT PRICING
Screen 06

Transparent
pricing, honest details.

Product hero, bilingual name, SKU code, availability — everything a shopper needs to decide before the next trip.

  • A

    Bilingual naming

    English + Nepali side by side — reaches every BBSM shopper.

  • B

    Breadcrumb hierarchy

    Dairy › Milk. Easy to back out and keep browsing.

  • C

    SKU + availability

    The code staff & shoppers share at the counter.

03 · ROADMAPBEYOND V1
What comes next

V1 ships what shoppers need. V2 turns it into a channel.

V1 · NOW

Discover & browse

Home, Offers, Stores, Catalogue, Product & Offer details. The 6 screens shown in this deck.

V2 · Q3

Account & loyalty

Saved shopping lists, member pricing, a digital BBSM card, and personalised push notifications.

V3 · 2027

Pick-up & delivery

Cart, checkout, click-and-collect from the chosen BBSM store, then last-mile delivery inside the Valley.
